# Upstream source: SRTPMs (v1.0.0)

- Project: Spatially Resolved Tumor Purity Maps (SRTPMs)
- Upstream archive: SRTPMs v1.0.0 (Zenodo)
- DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.5606981
- Declared license on Zenodo record: MIT License

Note:
The upstream zip we imported did not include a LICENSE file, but the Zenodo
record explicitly declares the MIT License under “Rights”. We include the full
MIT license text in `third_party/oner/LICENSE` to satisfy the MIT requirement
to preserve copyright + license notices.
